assert forall|x: int, y: int| feasible(a as int, b as int, c as int, x, y) implies stones_collected(x, y) <= max_stones as int by { // From Feasible: 2*y <= c so y <= c/2, and y <= b (since 2*x+y <= b, x >= 0) // Therefore y <= min(c/2, b) = c2 assert(y <= c2 as int);  if rem as int == a as int { // x <= a = rem, y <= c2, so x + y <= rem + c2 assert(x + y <= a as int + c2 as int); } else { // rem == (b - c2) / 2 // From 2*x + y <= b and y <= c2: 2*(x+y) <= b + c2 assert(2 * (x + y) <= b as int + c2 as int); // Integer arithmetic identity: (b-c2)/2 + c2 == (b+c2)/2 assert((b as int - c2 as int) / 2 + c2 as int == (b as int + c2 as int) / 2); } assert(x + y <= rem as int + c2 as int); }; }

assert forall|v: i64| #![auto] m2.count(v) == m.count(v) by { // m1.count(v) = m.insert(b).remove(a).count(v) // Using axiom_multiset_add and axiom_multiset_sub: // insert(b) = add(singleton(b)), remove(a) = sub(singleton(a)) // m.insert(b).count(v) = m.count(v) + singleton(b).count(v) // singleton(b).count(v) = if v == b { 1 } else { 0 } // m.insert(b).remove(a).count(v) = //   if m.insert(b).count(v) >= singleton(a).count(v) then //     m.insert(b).count(v) - singleton(a).count(v) //   else 0 // But we know a is in m (since i is a valid index), so m.count(a) >= 1 // Similarly b is in m.  // Let the SMT solver figure it out with explicit count triggers let _ = m.count(v); let _ = m.insert(b).count(v); let _ = m.insert(b).remove(a).count(v); let _ = m1.insert(a).count(v); let _ = m1.insert(a).remove(b).count(v); let _ = Multiset::<i64>::singleton(a).count(v); let _ = Multiset::<i64>::singleton(b).count(v);  // Key fact: a and b are both in m s.to_multiset_ensures(); assert(m.count(a) >= 1nat); assert(m.count(b) >= 1nat); }

assert forall|i: int, j: int| 1 <= i <= n && 1 <= j <= m implies reachable_within(n, m, r, c, time).contains((i, j)) by { assert(abs_val(i - r) <= dr) by(nonlinear_arith) requires 1 <= i <= n, dr >= r - 1, dr >= n - r, abs_val(i - r) == if (i - r) >= 0 { i - r } else { -(i - r) }, ; assert(abs_val(j - c) <= dc) by(nonlinear_arith) requires 1 <= j <= m, dc >= c - 1, dc >= m - c, abs_val(j - c) == if (j - c) >= 0 { j - c } else { -(j - c) }, ; reachable_complete(n, m, r, c, time, i, j); } }
